name: Ham-And-Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, rye flour, baking powder, salt, and light brown sugar.
2. Add vegetable oil, Worcestershire sauce, spicy brown mustard, hot sauce, and chopped ham to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
3. Beat egg lightly and stir into the mixture until moistened.
4. Grease a muffin pan with additional oil.
5. Fill each muffin cavity about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 22-25 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the pan immediately and let cool on a wire rack.
